## Problem
What problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature, module, or workflow change.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope and safety
Explain how this feature stays within authorized security testing and avoids exploitation/bypass behavior.

## Additional context
Add screenshots, logs, or examples if helpful.
